stem: At a certain time and day, a flagpole casts a shadow 24 feet long. At the same time, a nearby fence post casts a shadow 4 feet long. If the flagpole is 36 feet tall, which of the following is closest to the height, in feet, of the fence post?
rationale: Choice D is correct. The height and shadow length are proportional: 36/24 = h/4. Solving gives h = 4 × (36/24) = 6 feet.
